endpoints.name: Job Titles and Descriptions
endpoints.description: Retrieves the names, descriptions, and UUIDs of all job titles.

endpoints.name: Job Title Autocomplete
endpoints.description: Retrieves the names, descriptions, and UUIDs of all job titles matching a given search criteria.

endpoints.name: Job Title Normalization
endpoints.description: Retrieves the canonical job title for a synonymous job title

endpoints.name: Unusual Job Titles
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of unusual job titles and the UUIDs of their canonical jobs.

endpoints.name: Job Title and Description
endpoints.description: Retrieves the name, description, and UUID of a job by specifying its O*NET SOC Code or UUID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Jobs Associated with a Job
endpoints.description: Retrieves a collection of jobs associated with a specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Skills Associated with a Job
endpoints.description: Retrieves a collection of skills associated with a specified job.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Skill Names and Descriptions
endpoints.description: Retrieve the names, descriptions, and UUIDs of all skills.

endpoints.name: Skill Name Autocomplete
endpoints.description: Retrieves the names, descriptions, and UUIDs of all skills matching a given search criteria.

endpoints.name: Skill Name Normalization
endpoints.description: Retrieves the canonical skill name for a synonymous skill name

endpoints.name: Skill Name and Description
endpoints.description: Retrieves the name, description, and UUID of a job by specifying its UUID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Jobs Associated with a Skill
endpoints.description: Retrieves a collection of jobs associated with a specified skill.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Skills Associated with a Skill
endpoints.description: Retrieves a collection of skills associated with a specified skill.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
